title: Global Oil Prices Hit 6-Month High
content: Crude oil futures jumped today as supply chain disruptions in the Middle East continue to worry investors.

title: AI Startup Unveils Revolutionary Neural Chip
content: A Silicon Valley firm claims its new processor can run large language models with 90% less power consumption.

title: Inflation Rates Stabilize Across Major Economies

title: Streaming Giant Cancels Top-Rated Sci-Fi Series
content: Fans have launched an online petition after the surprise cancellation of 'Nebula Quest' following its second season.

title: New Trade Agreement Signed Between EU and India
content: The landmark deal aims to reduce tariffs on technology imports and boost agricultural exports for both regions.

title: Underdog Team Pulls Off Massive Cricket Upset

content: Major tech indices dropped 3% today as lawmakers proposed stricter data privacy laws for social media companies.

title: Smartphone Shipments See Sharp Decline in Q1
content: Industry analysts point to longer replacement cycles and a lack of 'must-have' features in the latest flagship models.

title: Hollywood Legend Announces Retirement
content: The 85-year-old Oscar winner stated that their upcoming biographical film will be their final performance.

title: Renewable Energy Hits Record 40% of Grid Share
content: Wind and solar power production reached an all-time high last month thanks to favorable weather conditions and new infrastructure.

title: New Mars Rover Sends Back High-Res Images

title: Luxury Electric Vehicle Sales Outpace Hybrids
content: Market data shows a significant shift in consumer preference toward fully electric high-end SUVs over the last fiscal year.

title: Central Bank Holds Interest Rates Steady

title: Cryptocurrency Value Plummets After Exchange Hack

title: Local Government Approves New Urban Park
